public_functions.behavior_description: Initialize eGTM ATOM0 PWM generation for a 3-phase inverter and provide an ADC trigger using eGTM Cluster 0 ATOM0 CH0–CH3. 1) Enable and initialize eGTM (Cluster 0) and ATOM0; configure a 20 kHz shared time base. 2) Configure ATOM0 CH0–CH2 as PWM outputs for phases U/V/W using IfxEgtm_Pwm; start with 0% duty, enable required deadtime, and route outputs to the assigned pins. 3) Configure ATOM0 CH3 as a 20 kHz, 50% duty signal; use its falling edge as the ADC trigger and route it to TMADC0. 4) Enable the ADC module and configure TMADC0 in queued/polled mode: prepare the queue of required channels, initialize their configurations, and run TMADC in polled (non-interrupt) mode. TODO: Specify exact ADC0.CHx and/or Px.y mappings and the channel queue order when the pinout is finalized. 5) Optionally configure a system timebase (e.g., WUT) if periodic tasks are required. 6) Configure the LED GPIO as a push-pull output and set its initial inactive level.
